Body.Content:
The OneDrive and SharePoint web PDF viewer will block screenshots and screen capture in Microsoft Edge when users open PDFs whose sensitivity (MIP) label includes the Do Not Allow Screen Capture permission.

GA date: August CY2026
Body.Markdown:
The OneDrive and SharePoint web PDF viewer will block screenshots and screen capture in Microsoft Edge when users open PDFs whose sensitivity (MIP) label includes the Do Not Allow Screen Capture permission.

GA date: August CY2026

Details.Name: Summary
Details.Value: The OneDrive and SharePoint web PDF viewer will block screenshots and screen capture in Microsoft Edge when users open PDFs whose sensitivity (MIP) label includes the Do Not Allow Screen Capture permission.

Details.Name: CloudInstances
Details.Value: DoD, GCC, GCC High, Worldwide (Standard Multi-Tenant)

message.Title: OneDrive: Block screen capture for sensitivity-labeled PDFs in the OneDrive and SharePoint web viewer

Body.Content:
The OneDrive and SharePoint web PDF viewer will block screen capture in Microsoft Edge when users open PDFs whose sensitivity (MIP) label without Copy (EXTRACT) permission.

GA date: August CY2026
